name: node-osenv
title: node-osenv
summary: Environment settings lookup module for Node.js
description:
Environment settings lookup module for Node.js
node-osenv looks for hostname, user, prompt, tmpdir, home, path,
editor, shell in environment variables, utilities like hostname or
whoami, with appropriate default values.
It supports the same platforms as Node.js does.
.
Node.js is an event-based server-side javascript engine.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use node-osenv because Environment settings lookup module for Node.js.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use node-osenv as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair node-osenv with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `node-osenv --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
